title: FATHIYA Hidden Leverage Techniques
summary: Hidden leverage techniques that unlock deeper AI-assisted value through adversarial thinking, self-critique, and structured challenge patterns.
key_principles: Adversarial roles: assign the AI to argue against your position to surface blind spots.
Self-critique: force the model to evaluate its own output before accepting it.
Opponent mode: simulate a hostile reviewer or competitor to stress-test ideas.
Dump-then-rebuild: generate a first draft, destroy it systematically, then rebuild from the strongest fragments.
Time simulation: project outcomes across different timeframes to reveal hidden dependencies and risks.
boundary: Technique documentation only. Does not activate adversarial modes or modify system behavior.
